overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Slytherin student walking through stone corridors into the Great Hall during breakfast. The scene transitions from dimly lit Gothic hallways to a grand sunlit dining hall with floating candles, house tables, and students eating.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor leading to Great Hall entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone corridor toward the large wooden doors

notable_agents.action: flying on a broomstick or levitating in the antechamber ahead

rough-hewn stone blocks forming the corridor wall

tall double doors with intricate carvings and metal hinges

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit stone corridor with Gothic architecture, approaching large wooden doors. The space is narrow and enclosed with sparse presence of other characters, including a figure flying on a broomstick visible in the distant antechamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall dining area with house tables

events.description: character opens large wooden doors and enters the Great Hall from the antechamber
dramatic shift from dim corridor to bright sunlit hall with golden beams streaming through stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: pushing open the heavy wooden doors and walking down the central aisle between the house tables

entered.detail: hundreds of candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
massive Gothic windows with colorful panes casting patterned light
long wooden dining tables with green tablecloths and seated students
long wooden dining tables with green tablecloths and seated students
golden rays of morning light streaming through the high windows
massive stone fireplace with burning fire on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the magnificent Great Hall as golden sunlight streams through towering stained glass windows. Floating candles illuminate the space above long house tables filled with students eating breakfast. The camera walks down the central aisle between the Slytherin and other house tables, passing stone pillars and a large fireplace.

events.description: game UI appears displaying '8:00am Breakfast' in the bottom right corner

agents.ego_description: standing still and observing the Great Hall filled with students eating breakfast

entered.detail: semi-transparent game interface showing '8:00am Breakfast' text

segments.scene_description: The camera comes to a stop and settles into a static view of the Great Hall. Students continue eating and conversing at the house tables beneath the floating candles. A game UI element appears indicating it is 8:00am breakfast time, and the scene remains stable showing the warm golden atmosphere of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, enclosed Gothic corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched grandeur of the Great Hall. It begins by navigating a narrow stone hallway with sparse company, passing a distant figure on a broomstick while approaching a set of large wooden doors. As the character pushes through the entrance, the scene opens into a magnificent hall where golden sunlight streams through towering stained glass windows and floating candles drift above long house tables. The camera then glides down the central aisle, passing stone pillars and a large fireplace as students eat breakfast in the warm light. Finally, the movement settles into a static view of the bustling hall, where a time indicator appears over the golden atmosphere as students continue their morning conversations.
